name: Leek and Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 large Idaho potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
3 medium leeks, white only, cut into rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the potatoes, leeks, water, and chicken base in a 2½-quart pot.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat, then season with pepper.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer until the potatoes and leeks are soft (about 25 minutes).
4. In a food processor, puree the soup in batches and return it to the original pot.
5. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
6. Reheat very slowly.
7. Serve with fresh minced chives sprinkled on top.
